== Notes for [[Item:Q107879|Q107879]] ==

* '''3rd Abbasid Caliph'''
* Reign: 158-169 AH (775–785 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al-Mahdi

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abassa

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zubaidah_bint_Ja%60far
--------------------
3rd khalif of the race of Abbas, succeeded his father Abu Jafar al-Mansur, to the throne of Baghdad in 775.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000010761182277

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
